title: sideritis incana subsp. tunetana
intro: Sideritis incana subsp. tunetana, also known as North African mountain tea, is a subspecies of the Sideritis incana plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sideritis incana subsp. tunetana include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Sideritis incana subsp. tunetana is typically prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the dried leaves in hot water, and it can also be found in capsule or tincture form for those who prefer a more concentrated dosage.
